metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5029
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1: VLDLR synaptic localization was shown using immunofluorescence labeling with confocal imaging of VLDLR, PSD-95 (DLG4) and synaptophysin (SYP) in mouse primary hippocampal neurons (DIV 21). The imaging resolution is too low to narrow down localization to pre- and/or post-synapse.. Experimental description: M&M: "VLDLR knockout mice were raised from stocks originally created through targeted gene deletion [13]. All experiments used wild-type littermates as controls."

antibody:
anti-VLDLR (5F3, generous donation from Dr. Dudley Strickland; IIII, generated in the laboratory of Dr. Guojun Bu; 74, generous gift from Dr. Joachim Herz)

checks.label: OWL Consistency
